sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68967" key="mualo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυᾰλός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυᾰλόω</orth>, later spellings for <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μυελ</itype>-, blamed by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">282</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
